reason: The assistant correctly uses all tools (create_pod, add_content, semantic_search, ingest_documents) and completes the full task workflow. Tool outputs are mostly grounded, though one add_content response contains a parse_error with internal simulation artifacts - a minor issue. The user behaves naturally with realistic follow-ups and provides information when prompted, though shows slightly more cooperation than a typical user might. The planner set up a coherent task that matches the available tools, progressing logically from pod creation to content addition to search to file ingestion. No hallucinations detected - the assistant consistently references actual tool results.
